bgpd (FRR)::bgp_process_main_one().action: Receives BGP UPDATE message, runs best-path selection algorithm, installs winning route into FRR RIB

zebra (FRR)::rib_process_result().action: Receives route from bgpd via internal ZAPI, installs into zebra RIB, programs Linux kernel via netlink, and sends FPM message to fpmsyncd

fpmsyncd::RouteSync::onRouteMsg().action: Receives FPM netlink message from zebra via TCP socket (port 2620), parses RTM_NEWROUTE, writes route to APPL_DB ROUTE_TABLE

orchagent (RouteOrch)::RouteOrch::addRou.action: Notified of APPL_DB ROUTE_TABLE change via ConsumerStateTable, resolves next-hop to SAI neighbor/next-hop-group objects, calls sai_route_api->create_route_entry()

syncd::Syncd::processSingleEvent().action: Receives SAI Redis notification from ASIC_DB, calls vendor SAI library sai_route_api->create_route_entry() which programs the ASIC TCAM/FIB
